name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n?=
subject: Have you heard the news?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | Have you heard the news?

**[President-Elect Biden named my good friend Congresswoman Deb Haaland to be his Secretary of the Interior.](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bcae/18e32a7f/4bd572a0/7b20253a/1409153166/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/public-lands-survey?source=20210122_em_pet_b1_lujan_ia")**

She will be the FIRST ever Native American Cabinet Secretary. I have no doubt she will be an amazing advocate for America's public lands and will diligently uphold U.S. treaties with Tribal Nations.

When I passed the Land Grant-Mercedes bill to protect our public lands in the House, Deb was right there with me.

When I worked to secure funding for our national parks, Deb helped me along the way.

**_[I'm personally asking our fellow Americans to show their support for Deb Haaland's nomination by signing my critical petition before midnight >> ](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bcae/18e32a7f/4bd572a0/7b20253a/1409153166/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/public-lands-survey?source=20210122_em_pet_b1_lujan_ia")_**

Here's what you need to know:

Deb Haaland's nomination needs to be approved by the Senate before it's official.

I know firsthand her commitment to the sanctity of our public lands because, like me, she has spent her entire career defending them.

But McConnell and Senate Republicans have spent years degrading our national parks, public lands, and relationships with Tribal Nations.

**[They know Rep. Haaland will finally hold them accountable, and they could try to block her nomination.](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bcae/18e32a7f/4bd572a0/7b20253a/1409153166/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/public-lands-survey?source=20210122_em_pet_b1_lujan_ia")** **[We can win this, but I need 24 signatures from Cresco to show overwhelming support and secure Deb's nomination >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bcae/18e32a7f/4bd572a0/7b20253a/1409153166/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/public-lands-survey?source=20210122_em_pet_b1_lujan_ia")** | **[SIGN YOUR NAME NOW >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bcae/18e32a7f/4bd572a0/7b20253a/1409153166/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/public-lands-survey?source=20210122_em_pet_b1_lujan_ia")**
---

I've watched Republicans prioritize oil profits over our public lands.

I've watched them try to build a border wall through sacred lands.

I've watched them strip $480 million from our National Park Service.

_But with Deb in the Interior, she will put an end to these injustices._

Now that I've officially been sworn in to the Senate, I am committed to doing everything I can to ensure her nomination is successful.

**[But I can't do it alone. I need an overwhelming surge of support for Deb and our public lands -- 10,000 signatures before midnight -- to show that Americans stand strong and united with Deb and with our national parks. Will you sign before midnight?](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bcae/18e32a7f/4bd572a0/7b20253a/1409153166/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/public-lands-survey?source=20210122_em_pet_b1_lujan_ia")**

**[SUPPORT DEB HAALAND NOW >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bcae/18e32a7f/4bd572a0/7b20253a/1409153166/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/public-lands-survey?source=20210122_em_pet_b1_lujan_ia")**
---

Thanks for your help,

Ben

---
[](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bcae/18e32a7f/4bd572a0/7b20253b/1409153166/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bcae/18e32a7f/4bd572a0/7b202538/1409153166/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bcae/18e32a7f/4bd572a0/7b202539/1409153166/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bcae/18e32a7f/4bd572a0/7b20253e/1409153166/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is fighting in the Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bcae/18e32a7f/4bd572a0/7b20253f/1409153166/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/saph_brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bcae/18e32a7f/4bd572a0/7b20253c/1409153166/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bcae/18e32a7f/4bd572a0/7b20253d/1409153166/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bcae/18e32a7f/4bd572a0/7b202539/1409153166/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bcae/18e32a7f/4bd572a0/7b20253b/1409153166/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bcae/18e32a7f/4bd572a0/7b202532/1409153166/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

---

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Stacey Abrams has a message for you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa31a/34a064cc/1d727d14/70272db/420059909/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - Together, we have flipped the scales toward justice. Georgians delivered the votes necessary for a Biden-Harris presidency, and the deciding votes for control of the U.S. Senate, by electing Senators Rev. Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff. This would not have been possible without your efforts and investments. Fair Fight and our allies laid the groundwork for years in Georgia to pave the way for these wins. Whether you have been with us for a month or from the first day, you made this historic victory possible. Here is a message from our Founder, Stacey Abrams, on our shared success. [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa31a/34a064cc/1d727d14/70272d8/420059909/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/staceyabrams/status/1352789148873101312?s=20") It is a new day for our country, but our work is not done. State legislatures across the country are already trying to roll back voting rights, especially targeting voting by mail and early voting. **Save the date -- Saturday, February 27-- for a special event to celebrate our victories and learn how to stay in the fight.** Invites and details are soon to come! We will continue our mission to advocate for free and fair elections for all, and fight for the sacred right to vote. Thank you for all you do. Now let's get it done, again. \- Team Fair Fight [DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa31a/34a064cc/1d727d14/70272d9/420059909/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fair-fight-1?refcode=NATE012121TY") |

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Biden Undermines Rule of Law
body:
Demand a Special Counsel for Biden Corruption!

[INSIDE JW]

Biden and the Rule of Law

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=21859&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9GN08zMUhqVXZjQT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEyMzAyMzYxMA==]

President Biden began his presidency with a disturbing inauguration
speech
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=21860&F=T&]
that signaled his administration will target any political opponents
who reject his radical agenda. This would be a continuation of
Obama-era practices, which saw the Obama IRS, DOJ, FBI, CIA, etc. used
to target Obama opponents ranging from small citizen Tea Party groups
to then-candidate Donald Trump. Indeed, that virtually no ordinary
Americans were allowed to view the proceedings in person thanks to a
politicized military shutdown of our nation’s capital doesn’t
augur well for this Republic and our civil liberties.

And then Biden immediately undermined the rule of law by shutting down
virtually all deportations and essentially ending all enforcement of
our nation’s immigration laws. You can read the details here
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=21861&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGhzLmdvdi9wdWJsaWNhdGlvbi9tZW1vcmFuZHVtLWFjdGluZy1zZWNyZXRhcnktcGVrb3NrZS1pbW1pZ3JhdGlvbi1lbmZvcmNlbWVudC1wb2xpY2llcz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEyMzAyMzYxMA==].

And, of course, Biden’s mere presence in office is a challenge to
the rule of law because of his personal corruption issues.

There is substantial evidence
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=20566&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvcnVzc2lhbnMtdHJvbGxpbmctam9lLWJpZGVuLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEyMzAyMzYxMA==],
from documents
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=21862&F=T&]
and witness statements, that the Biden family, including President Joe
Biden, may have been involved in criminal activity involving, among
other issues, foreign entities tied to Ukraine and China.

Joe Biden's son Hunter has already acknowledged
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=21863&F=T&]
that he is the target of an FBI criminal investigation. (Judicial
Watch was the first to document that Hunter took five trips to China
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=21864&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWZsaWdodHMvXXdoaWxlP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMTIzMDIzNjEw
his father was vice president!)

A special counsel should immediately be appointed because the Biden
Justice Department is conflicted in investigating any matter that
could implicate President Biden or his immediate family. The fact that
it hasn’t happened yet tells you a lot about the partisan corruption
of the Justice Department and FBI.

To increase pressure for the rule of law and to educate more
Americans, Judicial Watch created a petition
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=21865&F=T&]
on Change.org calling on the Department of Justice to create a special
counsel to investigate the Biden Family. Our petition continues to
grow! More than 85,000 have signed, and you can too here
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=21866&F=T&].
Be sure also to share it widely. Achieving one million signatures is
within our reach!

In the meantime, you can trust Judicial Watch to do what it does best
– which is to use the courts to hold corrupt politicians such as Joe
Biden accountable to the law. We have dozens of lawsuits and hundreds
of Freedom of Information Act requests already pending – and more
are coming. For example, we are NOT going to forget about the
Obama/Biden spy abuse and other sedition against the Trump
administration and the Constitution.

Judicial Watch and I (and you, dear supporter, with Biden’s implicit
support) have been targeted for Big Tech censorship and suppression
because of our demonstrated record of success.

BIDEN ADVISOR RANKED MAO ZEDONG AMONG ‘FAVORITE POLITICAL
PHILOSOPHERS’

Keep your eye on China.

A national counterintelligence official reportedly
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=21867&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjEvMDEvMTkvaW50ZWwtb2ZmaWNpYWwtd2FybnMtdGhhdC1jaGluYS13aWxsLWJlLWJpZGVuLWFkbWluaXN0cmF0aW9ucy1iaWdnZXN0LWZvZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMjMwMjM2MTA=]
warned President Biden that China poses a “more severe” threat to
the country than any other American foe and that it will represent one
of his administration’s “biggest challenges.”

And then there are Hunter Biden’s scandalous dealings with China
that implicate his father.

In addition, a member of Biden’s team (and Obama’s before him)
thought favorably of the blood thirsty communist dictator Mao Zedong.
Our Corruption Chronicles blog has the details
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=21868&F=T&

In a scary preview of what lies ahead, a cherished senior advisor to
President Joe Biden ranked murderous Communist dictator Mao Zedong
among her “favorite political philosophers.” The egregious
admission actually forced the veteran political operative, Anita Dunn,
to resign
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=21869&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90aGVoaWxsLmNvbS9ibG9ncy9ibG9nLWJyaWVmaW5nLXJvb20vbmV3cy82NzE1NS1yZXBvcnQtd2hpdGUtaG91c2UtY29tbXVuaWNhdGlvbnMtZGlyZWN0b3ItcmVzaWduaW5nP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMTIzMDIzNjEw]
as Obama’s White House communications director over a decade ago and
now she’s back along with a lengthy roster of leftist officials who
served under the 44th president. Dunn sticks out among the group
because she publicly praised the Chinese Communist revolutionary
responsible for killing tens of millions and it was caught on video
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=21870&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj01cURzcmZ5LVp2ZyZmZWF0dXJlPWVtYl90aXRsZSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEyMzAyMzYxMA==].

The scandalous delivery occurred during a commencement address at a
high school in Washington D.C. while Dunn worked for the American
people. Here is what she said: “The third lesson and tip actually
comes from two of my favorite political philosophers: Mao Zedong and
Mother Teresa – not often coupled with each other, but the two
people I turn to most to basically deliver a simple point, which is,
you’re going to make choices; you’re going to challenge; you’re
going to say, ‘Why not?’; you’re going to figure out how to do
things that have never been done before.” A conservative media
outlet was the first to broadcast the clip and Dunn quit under
pressure after just seven months in the Obama White House. Dunn’s
return to Pennsylvania Avenue comes after serving as the senior
advisor to Biden’s presidential campaign and co-chair of the
Biden-Harris transition team.

Dunn was a key advisor on all aspects of the presidential campaign,
including messaging, debate preparation, and overall strategy,
according to an announcement
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=21871&F=T&]
issued by the Biden-Harris transition this month. She was also a
“key strategist” to Obama’s 2008 presidential campaign before
becoming White House communications director in 2009. “Dunn has also
served in a variety of roles in and out of government for former
Senate Democratic Leader Tom Daschle and former U.S. Senator Bill
Bradley,” the press release states. The document includes comments
from Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris about the group of
appointees that include Dunn. “Speaking honestly, with empathy, and
directly to the public about our administration will be among the key
pillars in this Presidency and White House,” Biden says. “At a
time when American families are facing numerous challenges, these
appointees will strengthen our administration’s ability to convey
information to the American people and be integral in our team’s
efforts to build our nation back better.” Harris refers to the group
as “dedicated public servants” that will help “deliver on our
commitment to contain the coronavirus pandemic, create an economy that
works for working people, and rebuild our country in a way that lifts
up all Americans.”

Not surprisingly, the announcement fails to mention the admiration
that one of the commander-in-chief’s top advisors has expressed for
an infamous Communist whose legacy is that of a mass murderer. Mao’s
Communist revolution is responsible for tens of millions of deaths and
his disastrous plan to transform China into a Communist wonderland by
ordering the collectivization of the country’s agriculture resulted
in millions of Chinese starving to death. Ironically known as the
“Great Leap Forward,” Communist leaders made owning private land
illegal and emphasized iron and steel production, forcibly removing
millions of agriculture workers from their land, and deploying them to
factories. It was the “most inhumane example of Mao’s contempt for
human life
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=21872&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL2FzaWEvY29tbWVudGFyeS90aGUtbGVnYWN5LW1hby16ZWRvbmctbWFzcy1tdXJkZXJd4oCdP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMTIzMDIzNjEw
according to a prominent historian.

A few years after that catastrophe Mao launched the bloody cultural
revolution to destroy his enemies. Gangs known as the Red Guards beat
up or murdered Intellectuals considered to be enemies of the state.
Teachers were humiliated by having their faces covered in ink, their
bodies draped in bizarre clothes, and a dunce cap. Some were forced to
get down on all fours and bark like dogs. Others were beaten to death,
all in the name of Maoism. In the meantime. Mao expanded China’s
large system of forced labor camps which saw tens of millions of
Chinese die because of primitive living conditions and inhumane
workdays. For a senior advisor to an American president to ever rank
the ruthless dictator among her favorite political philosophers is
downright disturbing.

2021 FORECAST: FOUR FIGHTS TO WATCH

We don’t know for sure what a Biden presidency will bring but given
the current pandemic of corruption here in DC, we can make some
reasonable forecasts. Micah Morrison, our chief investigative
reporter, sets out
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=21873&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi8yMDIxLWZvcmVjYXN0LWZvdXItZmlnaHRzLXRvLXdhdGNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEyMzAyMzYxMA==]
in his _Investigative Bulletin_ four issues we’re sure to confront.

A new president was sworn in yesterday and despite our differences, we
wish him well. President Biden has signaled he’ll embark on an
ambitious agenda. Here are four fights we’ll be closely watching:

THE BATTLE OVER BORDERS. Biden immediately threw down the gauntlet
with a big move on immigration. He announced plans to send to Congress
a sweeping immigration bill
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=21851&F=T&]
that includes far-reaching amnesty provisions, a fast track for
Dreamers, expanded access to the United States, and whiffs on border
security. Conservative rejection was swift. “A mass amnesty with no
safeguards and no strings attached is a nonstarter,” said Senator
Chuck Grassley. Biden signed a flurry of first-day executive actions
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=21852&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9hcG5ld3MuY29tL2FydGljbGUvam9lLWJpZGVuLWluYXVndXJhdGlvbi1kYXktb25lLWQ2NjM3ZGUxY2U5OTNkMjcyMTA4MzM3YzEwMzBiNzlkP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMTIzMDIzNjEw],
including rescinding the travel ban, rolling back immigration
enforcement, and halting construction on the border wall.

THE BATTLE OVER BIG TECH. As the world now knows, with days left in
his presidency, Donald Trump was banned by Twitter, suspended by
Facebook, and kicked off YouTube and Snapchat—an effective silencing
of the president of the United States. Many other conservative voices
have been silenced too. Judicial Watch’s own Tom Fitton was
suspended from Twitter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=21853&F=T&]
for an innocuous tweet about hydroxychloroquine—the exact same tweet
that Tom had repeatedly posted and that Twitter had found in September
to be not in violation of its rules. Big Tech’s concentration of
power and impact on free speech has become too blatant to ignore. In
2021, watch for the battle over Big Tech to move to Congress and the
courts.

THE BATTLE OVER TRUMP. The former president has decamped to Florida,
but he is certain to stay in the news. He leaves a legacy of
conservative judges, deregulation, and economic growth. His
adversaries are circling
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=21854&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2JjLmNhL25ld3Mvd29ybGQvdHJ1bXAtMjAyMS1sZWdhbC1jaGFsbGVuZ2VzLTEuNTc5NDg5MT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEyMzAyMzYxMA==]
with a second impeachment trial, a criminal investigation by the
Manhattan district attorney, a federal tax probe, defamation lawsuits,
and an assault on his worldwide business holdings
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=21855&F=T&].
The harassment and troubles will not cease, but he remains a potent
force in Republican politics. How will he use that power? The
political world will be watching closely.

THE BATTLE OVER BIDEN. With his son’s business dealings—including
with the controversial Ukrainian energy firm Burisma – under FBI
investigation
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=21856&F=T&],
President Biden’s Justice Department faces pressure to hand off the
probe to a special counsel, a development that will engulf the new
administration in controversy. On the legislative front, as an old
Washington hand, the new president knows that the window of
opportunity closes fast. Next January, will President Biden have a
record of legislative achievement, the pandemic erased, the economy
growing? Or will he be seen as feckless and wavering, unable to
achieve his goals, captive to his party’s left-wing
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=21857&F=T&

Time will tell.

The view from here: doubling down on a Senate impeachment trial while
pursuing a politically risky immigration deal is not a smart start.

Until next week ...

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52701&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMTIzMDIzNjEw]

[INSIDE JW] Biden and the Rule of Law [==] President Biden began his presidency with a disturbing inauguration speech [==] that signaled his administration will target any political opponents who reject his radical agenda. This would be a continuation of Obama-era practices, which saw the Obama IRS, DOJ, FBI, CIA, etc. used to target Obama opponents ranging from small citizen Tea Party groups to then-candidate Donald Trump. Indeed, that virtually no ordinary Americans were allowed to view the proceedings in person thanks to a politicized military shutdown of our nation’s capital doesn’t augur well for this Republic and our civil liberties. And then Biden immediately undermined the rule of law by shutting down virtually all deportations and essentially ending all enforcement of our nation’s immigration laws. You can read the details here [==]. And, of course, Biden’s mere presence in office is a challenge to the rule of law because of his personal corruption issues. There is substantial evidence [==], from documents [==] and witness statements, that the Biden family, including President Joe Biden, may have been involved in criminal activity involving, among other issues, foreign entities tied to Ukraine and China. Joe Biden's son Hunter has already acknowledged [==] that he is the target of an FBI criminal investigation. (Judicial Watch was the first to document that Hunter took five trips to China [ his father was vice president!) A special counsel should immediately be appointed because the Biden Justice Department is conflicted in investigating any matter that could implicate President Biden or his immediate family. The fact that it hasn’t happened yet tells you a lot about the partisan corruption of the Justice Department and FBI. To increase pressure for the rule of law and to educate more Americans, Judicial Watch created a petition [=] on Change.org calling on the Department of Justice to create a special counsel to investigate the Biden Family. Our petition continues to grow! More than 85,000 have signed, and you can too here [=]. Be sure also to share it widely. Achieving one million signatures is within our reach! In the meantime, you can trust Judicial Watch to do what it does best – which is to use the courts to hold corrupt politicians such as Joe Biden accountable to the law. We have dozens of lawsuits and hundreds of Freedom of Information Act requests already pending – and more are coming. BIDEN ADVISOR RANKED MAO ZEDONG AMONG ‘FAVORITE POLITICAL PHILOSOPHERS’ Keep your eye on China. A national counterintelligence official reportedly [=] warned President Biden that China poses a “more severe” threat to the country than any other American foe and that it will represent one of his administration’s “biggest challenges.” And then there are Hunter Biden’s scandalous dealings with China that implicate his father. In addition, a member of Biden’s team (and Obama’s before him) thought favorably of the blood thirsty communist dictator Mao Zedong. Our Corruption Chronicles blog has the details [== In a scary preview of what lies ahead, a cherished senior advisor to President Joe Biden ranked murderous Communist dictator Mao Zedong among her “favorite political philosophers.” The egregious admission actually forced the veteran political operative, Anita Dunn, to resign [] as Obama’s White House communications director over a decade ago and now she’s back along with a lengthy roster of leftist officials who served under the 44th president. Dunn sticks out among the group because she publicly praised the Chinese Communist revolutionary responsible for killing tens of millions and it was caught on video [==]. Here is what she said: “The third lesson and tip actually comes from two of my favorite political philosophers: Mao Zedong and Mother Teresa – not often coupled with each other, but the two people I turn to most to basically deliver a simple point, which is, you’re going to make choices; you’re going to challenge; you’re going to say, ‘Why not?’; you’re going to figure out how to do things that have never been done before.” A conservative media outlet was the first to broadcast the clip and Dunn quit under pressure after just seven months in the Obama White House. Dunn’s return to Pennsylvania Avenue comes after serving as the senior advisor to Biden’s presidential campaign and co-chair of the Biden-Harris transition team. # Reproductive Justice is Economic Justice...
My Friend,
Today marks 48 years since Roe v. Wade granted protection to reproductive rights. Today those rights are still at jeopardy, from state houses to the Supreme Court.We believe that reproductive rights are human rights. We believe that reproductive healthcare is healthcare. And we believe that we should elect more leaders who will protect human rights and healthcare.At Moms in Office, we support candidates who believe that too.[** Are you with us?**](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=135110c2db&e=3f151f8b74)There are no off years in politics - there are state and local elections across the country that need candidates who support the right of all individuals to make reproductive healthcare decisions about their own bodies.Thanks for all you do,Simona

Meet the new swamp, same as the old swamp. And 74 million voices get ignored. _**Again**_. [Click Here to Fight Back!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mlidjdk-ahkdjtlkr-y/) **Here's what the first few days of Biden/Pelosi/Schumer have done:**
* **Killed 11,000 jobs** and made America more dependent on foreign energy by killing the XL Pipeline
* **Opened up the border** by halting construction on the border wall and laying out a new amnesty plan for illegal immigrants

****

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XZBzEJiKg96l7aAD7TshUZktI1_aOs8x6D35Gs80twzcN8oGP5BtI7vs6XEM72EzcRwtMCW1fVIO-HHiq_UeLIaruBojk0PqkoB2mhrXpVbpSYngR9xbpy6LyQzgEKxufEiymT6LR-Fn9CqMl4peYZhkL9oTBSUQd3zYRMYKcGVT9mNUZE7ZeXUgDqFkQm0P81_duRi3wIUaqjRYxy7zkTveqjh3iT1_FQGe2iL8MmRCA8LSHPaiXqTGX-AKibNuKs-V8S9imx91pCLQpazKOyu6306fYTrJRvRBKXObotT3GcTqCKeQHrNgLEPdY2CBlk2x6SsRGyk4yA7qXLqvaFYYuv_Y_IrdfvvXflhMsJXvEBGmBGrBzZqD4yHgo_GljngnlAHqOwiCV83I2SqzNay0L7GKGF9jJEaHpjkwvWbLzUCECJjQfg==&c=_dt8fBefkYT9BIwd4jxUQ0TO17hEJLjOY4SpHsKE6keYe2eXUfdJbA==&ch=y9kt7MEhis8b1v6nOdvWQDXHDTxorGAJy4k2cSPKhp9cJ801i9DKeA==)
Today, I have a humble request, Friend. But before I ask, I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why your support is critical to our grassroots team.

I came to America as a young woman with my single-mother, searching for opportunity. Instead, I discovered a broken tax system and a government, no matter how well-intentioned, falling short. My mother was unfairly taxed -- a plight familiar to many. As a single mother, immigrant, and small business owner she lacked the resources to contest it.

It was then I decided enough is enough. I ran for the California State Board of Equalization -- the very agency that took advantage of my mother and so many others -- and won. Since then I have returned over $400 million to taxpayers, contested higher taxes, and focused on fixing a broken tax system that is holding our families and businesses back. With a record of results, I will continue to work for lower taxes so all Americans can keep more of their hard-earned dollars in their wallet.

**But I can 't do it alone. [That's why, today, I am humbly asking for your endorsement, Friend.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XZBzEJiKg96l7aAD7TshUZktI1_aOs8x6D35Gs80twzcN8oGP5BtI5KVE3IFLZCJzfukHbhdOzjld-SYJWGdtHW5Hcb1nCCL79hc3tmQdvVPjiewCRWTdqmNH7ljY8jtJ0U0Ph1--63KGJRiVSczq_BwyvND-euQ3VchsZazomoOhsIZKpq3O8kI-2IlgbpXbQtgyPku4VvLi9AkunU2oHpx4jUZ4EKfZ4Fo4zi6736oO0u0Nke7EdvR1Wj9XC_lyBVkRP9nyJqM5zxeyoK6z-rS0BzLSeykAo1uYkdy0dcDMS-c0D5uj-E5ZAmt5fNlKzeBfDZztZCckUCTXBp9kbYOjnWjnRL4srC9d7OOqpbb5zK7x5iXB33MDP1CRJMbGgLt3DrlbqTc-0aVqYYQGnEy-zLdXg9QPspoSUbQ4ow=&c=_dt8fBefkYT9BIwd4jxUQ0TO17hEJLjOY4SpHsKE6keYe2eXUfdJbA==&ch=y9kt7MEhis8b1v6nOdvWQDXHDTxorGAJy4k2cSPKhp9cJ801i9DKeA==)**

Friend, This is Ronny Jackson. I'm the former White House Chief Medical Advisor, a retired Navy Rear Admiral, and Congressman of Texas' 13th Congressional District. **Joe Biden JUST took office as President of the United States, and as one of his first actions, he 's planning on ROLLING BACK our hard-won pro-life policies. ** **The first item on his agenda is to ensure that abortion providers like Planned Parenthood are able to receive TAX-PAYER funds again.** This is an absolute disgrace to every pro-life citizen in America, and it goes directly against every belief that I have as a proud Christian. name: NRCC Polling
subject: Need your opinion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We're eager to hear your thoughts.

Hello,

Joe Biden has been president for only a few days, but he has already signed a flurry of executive orders, many of which affect our nation's immigration policies.
**Rapid Response Poll:**
---

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Thank you, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We think we owe you an explanation as to why growing our early support for John’s campaign is so important:
#
Peter,
It’s been just over two weeks since John first shared that he’s considering a run for the U.S. Senate — and what’s happened since then has been nothing short of, well, mind blowing! Our campaign has received an outpouring of support from **all 67 counties in Pennsylvania** , not to mention working people all across the country.
Candidly, we’re speechless. Thank you, thank you, thank you.
**Here’s why growing our early support is so important:** A huge part of why John and his family made it public that they’re considering a run is to gauge enthusiasm for his campaign — because taking the leap into a race as high-stakes as this one isn’t a decision to be made lightly.
**Every single dollar donated right now will make a difference as John seriously considers a run.[So, please donate $5 right now to show John you’re in his corner.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/918?refcode=em20210123-55&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=55%2E434096%2EOIXVp8)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/918?refcode=em20210123-55&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=55%2E434096%2EOIXVp8)**
Launching a campaign the right way is an expensive, labor-intensive process, and despite the unprecedented level of excitement we’ve seen since John announced he’s exploring a run, we’ve still got a hell of a lot of work ahead of us.
**This race is shaping up to be among the most important of 2022, and what happens in these next few weeks will shape the state of the race for months to come.** We’ve got a good feeling we can win this thing if we go for it — but our success will depend entirely on the amount of early support we see from you, Peter.
[Chip in $5 to let John, Gisele, and the entire Fetterman team know that you’ve got their backs in this campaign.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/918?refcode=em20210123-55&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=55%2E434096%2EOIXVp8)
Exciting news to come,
Team Fetterman
P.S. The honest reason we’re asking for contributions right now is so that John, his family, and our campaign team can see how many folks we can count on in this early stage of the race. [If you’re with John, donate $5 to be on record as one of John’s first-ever supporters as he weighs this decision to run for U.S. Senate. ](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/918?refcode=em20210123-55&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=55%2E434096%2EOIXVp8)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210123-55-footer&t=5&refcode2=55_434096_OIXVp8&akid=55%2E434096%2EOIXVp8)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Paid for by Fetterman for PA
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=55%2E434096%2EOIXVp8).
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
Mail us: Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211

Now, they are targeting Trump supporters like me who are willing to stand up to them.
Will you join me in taking a stand against the censorship of President Trump and conservatives online?

body:
Governor Reynolds has a bold plan to ensure that Iowa is ready to come back stronger than ever.
.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014pmSsqhwdCX7PK96fhhwhAo0XAYNdxjhuoANM7e_pgvu4e9AQyQyQBGOGrT49ic_sRd6TYtbUpLqdnnjCovSYCNyqcPw5sq2kekv70lqo2qENrUfFXIz_tzqVazCCa18eh0NPkjtW_bYPRdyziHfjCQZrzBQ62V4XyC8YaQKXClZOVVL5Kj0umTfSFMVZR0PBZTg5134h-zGOVH48gPQLlYKPD_DFLcZcMOQVAtBVxER4VuwFIo2vu1pbXzhVFq3vEbORvzYkvImobXpG00ACP2TlyfJE2fr9kONbn3SjMh2wHoTfYBv3Dxxn0KmbRZ10sRDXOcrvvfAlgpsO-73FSBFVZLZytIcb8kZTrapLqQU2cLcC4kz1S-0WfPXXapPQiL2VHuT6o2G7IEE2oKOC2Kz0OGbe1Y74VQyCxXIaC0RmncTKapxcA==&c=yUF-i8hAvlPQARuBO-JfloXqs9Wdg5KLRN98XZ4biTaAhkiQBxjg8g==&ch=W33JCa1g7wmZJv-Kv4u7NBnQvC_2hMPE5hf7gcq9kAZrnayZjX2q_w==)
Friend,
Governor Reynolds has a bold plan to ensure that Iowa is ready to come back stronger than ever. body:
%%First Name%%, our record speaks for itself, but I wanted you to hear from me anyway.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XQk2CubbT7EzIlShDr4wKoENWfVyajUN3Y79nGzV7E2wctJAWMPKmfraRjpqZ1VfZLKCvsy0qKeF581e1eIWVBrmIG_LBVhkvpk3vkJCNJKBFDnMp_uStotir15-Mbho3pn-lGj7g2ORB3fovwv1ViY5benuMTDF7Dzhk_tRP7zmq68fnX1A3MHqU1o_rKmYhvtFZYOiuQP1hPDQsJ3wAdeWl5V8oQNedhuAvhOLT5Lq6Q6pAYcl_bujYvPUrmG0vgqLgvxAbJ5XJAqH-BeY8TWm0iD9q5BKY72fq_nUUOmQeFO2OcrwEpkm-8ze6z5edvR7FeyPFdqb8RdP1_h46uwEejicUXn8wO6XICV9DASeUDWF6Lb8EoS4m9USwIxhKCfoZRxr-RoHhP9VkvsQ3Fi6_-G2aHp9JmwcxjVsmM2-Pij3s_qWUkcjvUmLfQ1Gq5ysBk6sR1A=&c=BGmuYOFJAv9j3Yv8e29ktwNwV59jV7Spy6qbqVuahvOJtBKtuLybNg==&ch=3N6kclG8joyEmOeI_wmOKC1OC-18WKt6xyPDa2_lUANPTBkArCP9Rw==)
Friend,

My record has always been clear -- _actions always come first over rhetoric_. I'm running on the Rutledge Record. A record that has a clear history of putting Arkansans **FIRST** and politics **SECOND**.

_**Last month alone, we delivered a major Supreme Court victory for independent pharmacies, announced Arkansas is the most pro-life state, and we are leading the fight to protect 2A rights and the NRA.**_
**[JOIN OUR CAMPAIGN FOR GOVERNOR](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XQk2CubbT7EzIlShDr4wKoENWfVyajUN3Y79nGzV7E2wctJAWMPKmfraRjpqZ1VfZLKCvsy0qKeF581e1eIWVBrmIG_LBVhkvpk3vkJCNJKBFDnMp_uStotir15-Mbho3pn-lGj7g2ORB3fovwv1ViY5benuMTDF7Dzhk_tRP7zmq68fnX1A3MHqU1o_rKmYhvtFZYOiuQP1hPDQsJ3wAdeWl5V8oQNedhuAvhOLT5Lq6Q6pAYcl_bujYvPUrmG0vgqLgvxAbJ5XJAqH-BeY8TWm0iD9q5BKY72fq_nUUOmQeFO2OcrwEpkm-8ze6z5edvR7FeyPFdqb8RdP1_h46uwEejicUXn8wO6XICV9DASeUDWF6Lb8EoS4m9USwIxhKCfoZRxr-RoHhP9VkvsQ3Fi6_-G2aHp9JmwcxjVsmM2-Pij3s_qWUkcjvUmLfQ1Gq5ysBk6sR1A=&c=BGmuYOFJAv9j3Yv8e29ktwNwV59jV7Spy6qbqVuahvOJtBKtuLybNg==&ch=3N6kclG8joyEmOeI_wmOKC1OC-18WKt6xyPDa2_lUANPTBkArCP9Rw==)** But we're just getting started, Friend. Our campaign slogan is "Make Arkansas First", _and we 've proved it's more than just a slogan _\--**and we 're just getting started.** **[JOIN OUR CAMPAIGN FOR GOVERNOR](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XQk2CubbT7EzIlShDr4wKoENWfVyajUN3Y79nGzV7E2wctJAWMPKmfraRjpqZ1VfZLKCvsy0qKeF581e1eIWVBrmIG_LBVhkvpk3vkJCNJKBFDnMp_uStotir15-Mbho3pn-lGj7g2ORB3fovwv1ViY5benuMTDF7Dzhk_tRP7zmq68fnX1A3MHqU1o_rKmYhvtFZYOiuQP1hPDQsJ3wAdeWl5V8oQNedhuAvhOLT5Lq6Q6pAYcl_bujYvPUrmG0vgqLgvxAbJ5XJAqH-BeY8TWm0iD9q5BKY72fq_nUUOmQeFO2OcrwEpkm-8ze6z5edvR7FeyPFdqb8RdP1_h46uwEejicUXn8wO6XICV9DASeUDWF6Lb8EoS4m9USwIxhKCfoZRxr-RoHhP9VkvsQ3Fi6_-G2aHp9JmwcxjVsmM2-Pij3s_qWUkcjvUmLfQ1Gq5ysBk6sR1A=&c=BGmuYOFJAv9j3Yv8e29ktwNwV59jV7Spy6qbqVuahvOJtBKtuLybNg==&ch=3N6kclG8joyEmOeI_wmOKC1OC-18WKt6xyPDa2_lUANPTBkArCP9Rw==)**
_The next few months will be critical in our campaign for Governor_. We have to build an organization to compete and support from our grassroots conservatives is **CRITICAL** to our future success.
**[JOIN OUR CAMPAIGN FOR GOVERNOR](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XQk2CubbT7EzIlShDr4wKoENWfVyajUN3Y79nGzV7E2wctJAWMPKmfraRjpqZ1VfZLKCvsy0qKeF581e1eIWVBrmIG_LBVhkvpk3vkJCNJKBFDnMp_uStotir15-Mbho3pn-lGj7g2ORB3fovwv1ViY5benuMTDF7Dzhk_tRP7zmq68fnX1A3MHqU1o_rKmYhvtFZYOiuQP1hPDQsJ3wAdeWl5V8oQNedhuAvhOLT5Lq6Q6pAYcl_bujYvPUrmG0vgqLgvxAbJ5XJAqH-BeY8TWm0iD9q5BKY72fq_nUUOmQeFO2OcrwEpkm-8ze6z5edvR7FeyPFdqb8RdP1_h46uwEejicUXn8wO6XICV9DASeUDWF6Lb8EoS4m9USwIxhKCfoZRxr-RoHhP9VkvsQ3Fi6_-G2aHp9JmwcxjVsmM2-Pij3s_qWUkcjvUmLfQ1Gq5ysBk6sR1A=&c=BGmuYOFJAv9j3Yv8e29ktwNwV59jV7Spy6qbqVuahvOJtBKtuLybNg==&ch=3N6kclG8joyEmOeI_wmOKC1OC-18WKt6xyPDa2_lUANPTBkArCP9Rw==)**
I got into this race for governor for one reason -- to Make Arkansas FIRST. But I cannot do this alone. [**Can I count on you to join our conservative fight for Governor?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XQk2CubbT7EzIlShDr4wKoENWfVyajUN3Y79nGzV7E2wctJAWMPKmfraRjpqZ1VfZLKCvsy0qKeF581e1eIWVBrmIG_LBVhkvpk3vkJCNJKBFDnMp_uStotir15-Mbho3pn-lGj7g2ORB3fovwv1ViY5benuMTDF7Dzhk_tRP7zmq68fnX1A3MHqU1o_rKmYhvtFZYOiuQP1hPDQsJ3wAdeWl5V8oQNedhuAvhOLT5Lq6Q6pAYcl_bujYvPUrmG0vgqLgvxAbJ5XJAqH-BeY8TWm0iD9q5BKY72fq_nUUOmQeFO2OcrwEpkm-8ze6z5edvR7FeyPFdqb8RdP1_h46uwEejicUXn8wO6XICV9DASeUDWF6Lb8EoS4m9USwIxhKCfoZRxr-RoHhP9VkvsQ3Fi6_-G2aHp9JmwcxjVsmM2-Pij3s_qWUkcjvUmLfQ1Gq5ysBk6sR1A=&c=BGmuYOFJAv9j3Yv8e29ktwNwV59jV7Spy6qbqVuahvOJtBKtuLybNg==&ch=3N6kclG8joyEmOeI_wmOKC1OC-18WKt6xyPDa2_lUANPTBkArCP9Rw==)

Thank you for your support,

Leslie Rutledge

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XQk2CubbT7EzIlShDr4wKoENWfVyajUN3Y79nGzV7E2wctJAWMPKmfraRjpqZ1VfZLKCvsy0qKeF581e1eIWVBrmIG_LBVhkvpk3vkJCNJKBFDnMp_uStotir15-Mbho3pn-lGj7g2ORB3fovwv1ViY5benuMTDF7Dzhk_tRP7zmq68fnX1A3MHqU1o_rKmYhvtFZYOiuQP1hPDQsJ3wAdeWl5V8oQNedhuAvhOLT5Lq6Q6pAYcl_bujYvPUrmG0vgqLgvxAbJ5XJAqH-BeY8TWm0iD9q5BKY72fq_nUUOmQeFO2OcrwEpkm-8ze6z5edvR7FeyPFdqb8RdP1_h46uwEejicUXn8wO6XICV9DASeUDWF6Lb8EoS4m9USwIxhKCfoZRxr-RoHhP9VkvsQ3Fi6_-G2aHp9JmwcxjVsmM2-Pij3s_qWUkcjvUmLfQ1Gq5ysBk6sR1A=&c=BGmuYOFJAv9j3Yv8e29ktwNwV59jV7Spy6qbqVuahvOJtBKtuLybNg==&ch=3N6kclG8joyEmOeI_wmOKC1OC-18WKt6xyPDa2_lUANPTBkArCP9Rw==)

name: Team Marco
subject: Preparing for the worst
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend, the Radical Left is gearing up to take Marco down in 2022.

| | **Once again, Mike Garcia is making headlines for all the wrong reasons:** this time, over who he was spotted hanging out with on the House floor... 👇

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be89/29776869/846635a/569d7c3f/1533749248/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMV8yMTAxMjNfbWFuZG1yZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2101_email_christy?refcode=em21_210123_mandmresend_in")
**That's freshman GOP Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene -- best known as one of the new QAnon-believing congresswomen.**

Not only does Marjorie believe in this ridiculous, absurd, and dangerous conspiracy theory: She's also known for posting hours-long videos on Facebook where she voiced endless racist, Islamophobic, and anti-Semitic views. On her first day on the job, she _refused to comply_ with House rules and wear a face mask to protect against the spread of coronavirus -- leading to a screaming match on the House floor.

**And her lies about the November presidential election helped stoke a violent insurrection in Congress.**

It should be obvious to anyone that Marjorie is _uniquely_ unqualified to serve in the House of Representatives. **She's dangerous, and we've known that for a while.**

But we weren't expecting the 25th district's own Mike Garcia to join the fringe right-wing of his party so early on in his tenure. As the House debated impeachment of Donald Trump over the January 6th insurrection, the two could be seen seated next to each other and chatting.

Mike Garcia has proven over the last few weeks that he will put fringe partisanship over our country, over our district, and over the needs of our district. Instead of working to alleviate damage from the coronavirus pandemic, he is supporting outlandish ideas about election fraud.

**He's not fit to be our representative, and we must limit him to one term.**

**[If you're with us in the fight to bring back real leadership to CA-25, please chip in $25, or anything you can, to our Flip the 25th fund right now>>](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be89/29776869/846635a/569d7c3f/1533749248/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMV8yMTAxMjNfbWFuZG1yZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2101_email_christy?refcode=em21_210123_mandmresend_in")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be89/29776869/846635a/569d7c38/1533749248/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMV8yMTAxMjNfbWFuZG1yZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2101_email_christy?refcode=em21_210123_mandmresend_in&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be89/29776869/846635a/569d7c39/1533749248/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMV8yMTAxMjNfbWFuZG1yZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2101_email_christy?refcode=em21_210123_mandmresend_in&express_lane=true&amount=25")

name: Rita
subject: forwarding this along for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | Peter -- I wanted to make sure you saw this note from my team with the latest update on our contested election here in Iowa's 2nd district. There are still votes left to be counted in this race, but this week, my opponent filed to dismiss those votes and disenfranchise almost two dozen Iowans in the process. **I won 't stand for it, and I hope you won't either. ** [_**I need your help to make sure that every legal vote is counted in this race. Can you chip in $10 or more today so we can ensure all Iowans have their voices heard? >>**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/ncqdCRMnHVER5XcKAa3OyZmL9NCH_WDtMeg_JRIILs0=/uuItP21gXHdtERrOstOHrVCIlLFibDPencR-GDbfqe4=?refcode=210123-email) Thank you so much for your support, Peter. -Rita \---------forwarded message---------
**Sent: **January 22, 2021 at 1:05 PM
**From: **Team Rita
**Subject: **Count all the votes [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ncqdCRMnHVER5XcKAa3OyZmL9NCH_WDtMeg_JRIILs0=/uuItP21gXHdtERrOstOHrVCIlLFibDPencR-GDbfqe4=?refcode=210123-email) Team -- We think this is pretty straightforward: In an election, you count all the votes. But yesterday, Rita's opponent asked the House of Representatives to block the election recount and disenfranchise at least 22 Iowa voters. **They are trying to stop the counting of legal votes because they are afraid that when all the votes are counted, Rita will have won this race.** [_**Chip in here to make sure we get an accurate recount in this incredibly close race. >>**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/ncqdCRMnHVER5XcKAa3OyZmL9NCH_WDtMeg_JRIILs0=/uuItP21gXHdtERrOstOHrVCIlLFibDPencR-GDbfqe4=?refcode=210123-email) Team, this is the closest federal election in recent history and we _have_ to get it right. Almost two dozen Iowans are still waiting to have their votes counted and **thousands** have not had their ballots examined, so we're asking for your help today. [_**Can you chip in even $10 or $20 to help Rita make sure these votes are counted and we get a final tally in this election?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/ncqdCRMnHVER5XcKAa3OyZmL9NCH_WDtMeg_JRIILs0=/uuItP21gXHdtERrOstOHrVCIlLFibDPencR-GDbfqe4=?refcode=210121-email) We can't let Republicans pick and choose who gets their votes counted. [_**Help us count all the votes >>**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/ncqdCRMnHVER5XcKAa3OyZmL9NCH_WDtMeg_JRIILs0=/uuItP21gXHdtERrOstOHrVCIlLFibDPencR-GDbfqe4=?refcode=210123-email) Thank you for your support and for sticking with us. This fight is taking longer than we anticipated, but it's a fight we're going to win in the end with your help. All our best, -Team Rita | Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
---
Rita Hart for Iowa
P.O. Box 333
Wheatland IA 52777 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/ncqdCRMnHVER5XcKAa3OyZmL9NCH_WDtMeg_JRIILs0=/uoorJCYuTyC1nvsAadsre_FEoOmVamRKnnu3xVEistk=).

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: reaching back out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
The GOP is coming after me early because they think defeating me is their best chance at winning back Senate control.
Hello, everyone.
Raphael Warnock, Jon Ossoff, and Alex Padilla were _just_ sworn into the Senate, and Mitch McConnell and Republicans are already hard at work to unseat me.
**The GOP is coming after me early because they think defeating me is their best chance at winning back Senate control.**
Early momentum is the ONLY way I can defend this seat -- and the Senate majority. [**I need to raise another $7,338 _this weekend_ to get our campaign on track, and I'm asking for $3 or more from you to get us there. Will you please pitch in right now?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc790/2a380d31/21a64bd6/f05586/4095876846/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDEyM19zYXRfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210123_sat_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Falling short means opening the door for McConnell and special interests to launch baseless attacks against me. We only won our 2016 race by 1,017 votes, so that is a risk we absolutely cannot afford.
In a race as competitive as ours is sure to be, every single donation makes a huge difference -- and it could be the difference between holding on to this vulnerable seat or losing it to Republicans.
[**Let me just say, I 'm so grateful to have you with me, and I'm really hoping you can support my campaign and protect the Senate majority by giving $3 or more right now.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc790/2a380d31/21a64bd6/f05586/4095876846/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDEyM19zYXRfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210123_sat_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

**[Click to donate $25.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc790/2a380d31/21a64bd6/f05580/4095876846/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDEyM19zYXRfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFpQjlmUT09IjoiMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210123_sat_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
